common.error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common.not_registered: Please start a conversation with /start first.
common.banned: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support for assistance.

start.choose_language:
Welcome to ParkAddis! 🚗
Please select your preferred language:
start.welcome_driver:
Welcome to ParkAddis, {name}! 👋

You're moments away from finding convenient parking in Addis Ababa. Share your location and I'll show you available spots nearby.

Use the menu below to get started, or tap the button above to find parking immediately.
start.welcome_back:
Welcome back,{name}! 👋

Ready to find parking? Tap the button above or use the menu below.
start.menu_ready: 📋 Your menu is ready below — use it whenever you need it.

nearby.ask_location: 📍 Please share your location to find available parking spots near you.
nearby.searching: 🔎 Searching for available parking near you...
nearby.none_found: No available parking found within {radius} km. Try adjusting your search area or check back later.
nearby.map_cta: 🅿️ Found {count} spot(s) near you — tap to view on the map:
nearby.map_header: 🅿️ Found {count} available spot(s) near you. Numbers below match the map 👇
nearby.map_header_far: No spots within {radius} km — here are the {count} closest (nearest is {distance} away). Numbers match the map 👇
nearby.results_header_far: No spots within {radius} km — here are the closest options (nearest is {distance} away):

browse.pick_area: 🗺️ Select an area to browse available parking spots:
browse.none_in_area: No available spots found in {area} at this time.

spot.no_rating: ⭐ No ratings yet — be the first!

booking.choose_start: 🕐 When would you like to start parking?
booking.choose_duration: ⏱️ How long will you be parking?
booking.confirm_pending_note: Payment will be collected in the next step. This will reserve the spot now.
booking.reserved_body:
Your confirmation code is: *{code}*

📍 *{address}*
🕐 {start} → {end}
💰 *{total} {currency}*

Please present this code to the host upon arrival.
booking.next_step: Next step: complete payment to finalize your booking.
booking.conflict_full: Sorry, this spot is fully booked for your selected time. Please choose a different spot or time.
booking.spot_unavailable: This spot is no longer available. Please select another option.
booking.none: You don't have any bookings yet.

help.text:
🏆 *Welcome to ParkAddis Support*

ParkAddis helps you find, reserve, and manage parking across Addis Ababa.

*Available Commands:*
• 🅿️ *Find parking* — Share your location to discover nearby spots
• 🗺️ *Browse by area* — Explore parking options by neighbourhood
• 📋 *My bookings* — View and manage your reservations
• 🏠 *List your spot* — Become a host and earn from your parking space
• 🌐 *Language* — Switch between English and Amharic

*Need additional assistance?* Contact our support team.

host.start_intro: 🏠 Let's list your parking spot. You can cancel at any time.
host.ask_location: 📍 Share the location of your parking spot using the button below, or send a map pin.
host.need_location: Please share the spot's location using the button below, or send a map pin.
host.ask_address: ✍️ Enter a name or address for your spot (e.g. "Edna Mall Parking"), or tap Skip.
host.ask_price: 💵 What is the hourly price in {currency}? (e.g. 40)
host.bad_price: Please enter a valid price greater than 0 — for example: 40.
host.ask_capacity: 🚗 How many vehicles can park here? Tap a number below or type one.
host.bad_capacity: Please enter a valid number of vehicles (1–1000).
host.ask_amenities: ✨ Select any amenities available at your spot. Tap to toggle, then tap Continue.
host.ask_photo: 📷 Send a photo of your parking spot, or tap Skip.
host.need_photo: Please send a photo, or tap Skip.
host.listing_cancelled: Listing cancelled. No changes were saved.
host.my_spots_empty: You haven't listed any spots yet. Tap "🏠 List your spot" to get started.
host.paused_ok: ⏸ Spot paused — it will not appear in search results.
host.resumed_ok: ✅ Spot is now live and visible in searches.
host.edit_price_ask:
💵 Enter the new hourly price in {currency} for:
📍 {address}
host.bookings_empty: No upcoming bookings for this spot.
host.not_your_spot: You don't own this parking spot.
host.spot_gone: This parking spot no longer exists.

checkin.driver_notified: ✅ You have been checked in at {address}. Enjoy your parking!
checkin.not_completable: This booking cannot be completed — it may already be closed or not yet checked in.
checkin.err_not_found: This check-in code is invalid or has expired.
checkin.err_not_owner: Only the spot owner can check in this booking.
checkin.err_already: This booking has already been checked in.
checkin.err_invalid_state: This booking has been cancelled or is already completed.

payment.chapa_instructions: Pay securely via Telebirr, CBE Birr, or card. You will be redirected to Chapa's secure checkout page.
payment.manual_instructions:
Please transfer {amount} {currency} to:

📱 Telebirr: +251-XXX-XXXXXX
🏦 CBE Account: 1000XXXXXXX

Reference: {code}

After completing the transfer, upload a screenshot of your payment receipt below.
payment.waiting_receipt: Please send a screenshot of your payment receipt.
payment.received_receipt: ✅ Receipt received! We are confirming your payment...
payment.cancelled: ❌ Payment cancelled. Your reservation has been released.
payment.expired: ⏰ Payment window has expired. Please book again.
payment.already_paid: This booking has already been paid.
payment.payment_failed: Payment failed. Please try again or select manual transfer.
payment.verify_instructions: Tap below to verify your payment status:

rating.prompt_body: Rate your stay at {address} from 1 to 5 stars:
rating.ask_comment: Add a comment about your experience (optional), or tap Skip:
rating.submitted: Thank you for your feedback! Your rating helps the ParkAddis community.
rating.already_rated: You have already rated this booking.
rating.booking_not_completed: You can only rate completed bookings.
rating.error_generic: Failed to submit your rating. Please try again.

notification.checkin_prompt:
✅ Your booking at {address} is starting now!

Show the QR code below to the host.
notification.booking_cancelled_timeout:
❌ Booking {code} has been cancelled due to payment timeout.

You can book again whenever you're ready.
notification.spot_available:
✅ Good news! A spot at {address} just became available!

You have {expires_minutes} minutes to book before it becomes available to others.

favorites.title: ⭐ Your Favorite Spots:
favorites.empty: You haven't added any favorites yet. Browse parking spots and tap the heart icon to save them for quick access.
favorites.already_added: This spot is already in your favorites.

modification.choose_hours: How many hours would you like to extend?
modification.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
modification.refund_full: 💰 Full refund (100%) — more than 24 hours before start time.
modification.refund_partial: 💰 Partial refund (50%) — less than 24 hours before start time.
modification.refund_none: ⚠️ No refund — less than 2 hours before start time.
modification.invalid_status: This booking cannot be modified in its current state.
modification.slot_unavailable: Sorry, this time slot is no longer available.

waitlist.join_prompt:
This spot is fully booked for your selected time.

Would you like to join the waitlist? We'll notify you as soon as a spot opens up.
waitlist.joined: ✅ You have joined the waitlist! We'll notify you when a spot becomes available.
waitlist.already_on: You are already on the waitlist for this spot.

promo.invalid_code: Invalid promo code. Please check and try again.
promo.not_yet_active: This promo code is not yet active.
promo.max_uses_reached: This promo code has reached its usage limit.
promo.minimum_not_met: Minimum booking amount not met for this promo code.

recurring.pattern_type: How often do you need this spot?
recurring.select_day: Select the day of the week:
recurring.created: ✅ Recurring booking created! We will automatically book this spot for you.
recurring.deactivated: ✅ Recurring booking stopped. No future bookings will be created.
